commands.author: karmafeast
commands.command: our sincerest apologies. pr #79925 was closed due to an inclusion of ~100 dist backup dirs from an overzealous participant trying to delete 4x markdown files which had internal development notes, it being marked duplicate or superseded by an instance of clawsweeper, likely due to the massive diff. this bypassed several gates in our fork for safety, and was most unfortunate. again, apologies for the inconvenience. - we've reopened this as: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/85651
